Borussia Dortmund

Men's Football
German Bundesliga (Bundesliga)
  • About
  • Player Ratings
  • Other Clubs

    About Borussia Dortmund

    Borussia Dortmund is a football club from Germany that competes in the German Bundesliga (Bundesliga). On this team, the most players come from Germany (12 players). The youngest is Jobe Bellingham (20 years old) and the oldest is Alexander Meyer (35 years old).

    Borussia Dortmund in FC 26

    Borussia Dortmund's FC 26 highest rated players are Gregor Kobel and Nico Schlotterbeck with 86 OVR, followed by Serhou Guirassy with 85 OVR.

    • Fastest Player: Karim Adeyemi (96 PAC)
    • Best Shooter: Serhou Guirassy (85 SHO)
    • Best Passer: Julian Brandt (83 PAS)
    • Best Dribbler: Gregor Kobel (87 DRI)
    • Best Defender: Nico Schlotterbeck (87 DEF)
    • Most Physical Player: Gregor Kobel (86 PHY)
